Entries.Text: Param Merger

Select a compatible project below to merge into your current project.
You will need to create a project for the external mod first, it will then appear below
Compatible Projects
List of projects you can merge into your current project.
Load Project
Load the currently selected project.
Merge Project
If loaded, merge the currently selected project into this project.
Options
Include Added
If enabled, added rows in the target project will be merged into this project.
Include Modified
If enabled, modified rows in the target project (compared to this project) will be merged into this project.
Target Params
Determines which params are merged in.
Filter the param list...
Toggle All Params
Toggle the state of all the target params.
Loaded target project: {0} for Param Merge.
No target project selected. Cannot merge.
Target project: {0} is not loaded, cannot merge.
Merged target project rows: {0} into this project.
